KeysToEntries.Prov_Drink_EnergyDrinkShot_Description: Revitalize with Power Energy Fuel, a dynamic and invigorating blend crafted to ignite your day with a surge of vitality and focus! Now in a convenient and action-packed shot bottle! Take the Shot and never miss! Warning: Frequent consumption may cause restlessness, insomnia, paranoia, and heart palpitations.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Drink_EnergyDrinkCan_Description: Revitalize with Power Energy Fuel, a dynamic and invigorating blend crafted to ignite your day with a surge of vitality and focus! Warning: Frequent consumption may cause restlessness, insomnia, paranoia, and heart palpitations.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Drink_Gatorade_Description: Unleash the explosive potential of NuKlear Energy's Meltdown Mango, a cold fusion of vibrant flavor and rejuvenating power that keeps you fully charged and refreshed! NuKlear Energy - It's got electrolytes!
KeysToEntries.Prov_Drink_Water1L_Description: With a crystal-clear appearance, Aques Water invites you to quench your thirst with its pristine taste. Every sip delivers a crisp and clean sensation that rejuvenates your senses, making it a perfect companion for any occasion.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Drink_Water15L_Description: With a crystal-clear appearance, Aques Water invites you to quench your thirst with its pristine taste. Every sip delivers a crisp and clean sensation that rejuvenates your senses, making it a perfect companion for any occasion.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Drink_CoconutWater_Description: Experience the taste of the tropics in every drop, and quench your thirst with the best nature has to offer. Stay refreshed, stay revitalized – choose Topo Fresh Coconut Water.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Drink_LemonSoda_Description: Embrace the zing of citrus with this invigorating soda, offering a burst of tangy lemon flavor that definitely hits the spot!
KeysToEntries.Prov_Drink_LycheeNectar_Description: Kaipo Lychee Nectar brings you the cherished sweetness of lychee, captured in this delightful nectar! It may also be used as a medium-strong adhesive.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Drink_IsotonicDrink_Description: To infinity and... even further! This drink offers a balanced blend of electrolytes and refreshing flavors, ensuring endurance and vitality for every moment.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Drink_IcedCoffee_Description: A bold fusion of rich, dark-roasted coffee and icy refreshment. This chilled delight offers a robust coffee experience with a smooth, invigorating finish, perfect for those seeking a cool caffeine boost.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Drink_ThumsUpCola_Description: Cherish every sunrise in paradise with the bold taste of our premium cola.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Drink_LocalWater06L_Description: Pure and crisp, sourced from the pristine depths of our beautiful nature. Refreshing as a mountain spring and clean as our glorious rivers, the Noakon Drinking Water brings you closer to home with every sip. Warning: Not recommended to be consumed by foreigners.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Drink_CoconutJuiceDrink_Description: This thirst-quenching drink captures the natural sweetness of coconut, offering a refreshing and hydrating experience!
KeysToEntries.Prov_Drink_LocalIcedTea_Description: Blending the natural essence of tea leaves with a subtle sweetness, Maknav Iced Tea offers a cooling, flavorful experience that's perfect for a relaxed moment of refreshment.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Drink_LocalWater15L_Description: Pure and crisp, sourced from the pristine depths of our beautiful nature. Refreshing as a mountain spring and clean as our glorious rivers, the Noakon Drinking Water brings you closer to home with every sip. Warning: Not recommended to be consumed by foreigners.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Drink_SodaDrink2L_Description: A fusion of crisp green notes and sparkling bubbles, Riminda offers a vibrant and refreshing experience that invigorates the senses with every taste!
KeysToEntries.Prov_Drink_ColaDrink2L_Description: Cherish every sunrise in paradise with the bold taste of our premium cola.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Drink_LocalWater2L_Description: Indulge in the pure elegance of this pristine water. Crystalline in clarity and smooth in taste, it embodies a refined essence, offering a refreshing and hydrating experience.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Drink_GrayFocusedEnergy_Description: Special edition of the popular dietary supplement, now in a ready-to-drink can! Indulge in the refreshing lemonade flavor and give yourself that extra boost to face whatever comes your way. Blend in to stand out.
KeysToEntries.Prov_Drink_LocalWater1L_Description: Pure and crisp, sourced from the pristine depths of our beautiful nature. Refreshing as a mountain spring and clean as our glorious rivers, the Noakon Drinking Water brings you closer to home with every sip. Warning: Not recommended to be consumed by foreigners.
